meta.title: What really happens in a Marine infantryman's first firefight
meta.description:
Andy has since served all over the world in many capacities and he has a wealth of experience; we were honored to get a little of it here. These are the types of real human stories that occur within every person involved in a war, in their own unique ways.

Find Andy on Instagram and see what he’s up to now: https://www.instagram.com/cat_at_fluxmedia/ 

He’s been working on a new media business with some partners, support them on IG as they grow: https://instagram.com/fluxmediaconsulting?igshid=OGQ5ZDc2ODk2ZA== 

Another Marine shared his path to becoming a Scout Sniper with us. Check it out here: https://youtu.be/sadJypXivEQ?feature=shared 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social:
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews 
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews 
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sandboxxnews

Video Chapters:

00:00 – Introduction
00:41 – Infil
02:36 – The ambush
04:26 – The reality of fighting another human being
09:02 – Getting out of the ambush
12:32 – How did that firefight affect you?
